Telegram buy bot for Solana traders

SlimeWire helps Telegram users scan a token, inspect context, open charts, use presets, and track receipts without making the group chat do all the work.

Open @SlimeWiredBotSolana Telegram bot

Buy bot workflow

Scan

Paste a CA or catch an alert with token context.

Review

Open chart, market data, warnings, and liquidity notes.

Preset

Use amount, slippage, and exit presets consistently.

Handoff

Move from Telegram into the terminal when deeper review is needed.

Track

Positions, PnL, and receipts make the result visible.

Share

Groups can turn calls into proof links and cleaner updates.

FAQ

What is a Telegram buy bot?

A Telegram buy bot helps users move from a token scan or alert into a buy workflow, often with presets, wallet handoff, chart links, and receipts.

Can SlimeWire work from Telegram and web?

Yes. SlimeWire connects Telegram bot workflows with the web terminal for charts, positions, PnL, and deeper token review.

Should buy bots show receipts?

Yes. Receipts and proof links make group calls and personal trades easier to review later.
